mapper.select: SELECT * FROM batch_invoice_task ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM batch_invoice_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_invoice_task (task_no, task_name, task_type, status, total_count, success_count, fail_count, progress, created_by, finished_at) VALUES (#{taskNo}, #{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{progress}, #{createdBy}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_invoice_task SET task_no = #{taskNo}, task_name = #{taskName}, task_type = #{taskType}, status = #{status}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, progress = #{progress}, created_by = #{createdBy}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
